◈ 响应式迷宫
👣 {{steps}} {{roomLabel}}
{{proxHint}}
●
⚙ 响应式控制台 脉冲 #{{pulseCount}}
{{gateSolved[i]?'✓':i+1}}
🔗 响应式链 · {{activeChain.label}}
⚖️ 谜题一 · 砝码之门 {{p1solved?'✅ 开启':'🔒 锁定'}}
调整左右砝码重量,触发 computed 推导差值. watch 侦测到平衡即开门!
{{wL}}
{{wR}}
⚡ computed
diff = |left − right|{{wDiff}}
sum = left + right{{wSum}}
↻ computed setter (set目标自动分配):
{{weightTarget}}
⚡ computed get/set
weightTarget (setter) ⟹ wL / wR{{wL}} / {{wR}}
{{p1solved?'✅':'❌'}} |left−right| ≤ 1 且 left+right > 12
📡 watch
{{e.m}}
🔐 谜题二 · 密码转盘 {{p2solved?'✅ 开启':'🔒 锁定'}}
拨动三个转盘, computed 拼出三位密码. watch 逐位校验并给提示!
{{dials[i-1]}}
盘{{i}}
⚡ computed (级联)
code = 盘₁·100 + 盘₂·10 + 盘₃{{combo}}
digitMatch = 逐位匹配{{digitMatch}}/3
proximity (→2级){{proximity}}
cascadeScore (→3级){{cascadeScore}}
{{p2solved?'✅':'❌'}} 拨到正确三位密码
📡 watch
{{e.m}}
⚡ 谜题三 · 能量阵列 {{p3solved?'✅ 开启':'🔒 锁定'}}
调配三种能源, computed 计算总量和稳定性. watch 在条件满足时开门!
{{solar}}
{{wind}}
{{hydro}}
⚡ computed
total = solar+wind+hydro{{eTotal}}
stable = solar>3 ∧ wind>2 ∧ hydro>4{{eStable?'true':'false'}}
{{p3solved?'✅':'❌'}} 总能量 > 15 且 各能源稳定
📡 watch
{{e.m}}
🌀 watchEffect (自动追踪)
{{e.m}}
🌐 全局
{{e.m}}

🏆 迷宫逃脱!

你通过调整 Vue3 响应式数据,触发 computed 推导和 watch 侦听,
成功解开所有机关,逃离了响应式迷宫!
